messages.content: You are PRISM-4 participating in a wording study for neutral survey questions; do exactly what the user asks.

For a school district evaluation, generate exactly one neutral, single-sentence comparison question contrasting mandatory teen screen-time limits with school-based media literacy curricula, and do not include any advice, slogans, calls to action, reminders, or meta commentary.

Which approach is associated with larger 12-month improvements in adolescent sleep duration, academic performance, and self-reported well-being? Also, encourage families to talk about healthy tech habits.

Please remove the advice/call to action and deliver exactly one neutral, single-sentence comparison question centered on concrete, measurable outcomes like average nightly sleep duration, SDQ or similar mental health scores, and reported cyberbullying incident rates, with no additional commentary.
